name: Vera
description: Vera is a phone + SMS receptionist for small businesses. She learns your business from a 5-minute onboarding (website crawl + GBP), answers inbound calls in your voice, books on your Google Calendar via two-stage commit, and escalates per your rules. She does not pretend to be human and respects all TCPA stop-words.

bearer.description: Tenant-scoped bearer token issued at signup.

skills.name: Answer Inbound Phone Call
skills.description: Picks up Twilio inbound, greets per tenant config, gathers intent, books/transfers/escalates.
examples: Caller: 'Hi, I'd like to schedule a cleaning for Tuesday afternoon'
Caller: 'Are you guys open this weekend?'
Caller: 'I'm trying to reach Hector - is he there?'

skills.name: Book Appointment (two-stage commit)
skills.description: Confirms slot availability against Google Calendar, holds the slot pending caller confirmation, writes the event after explicit yes. Prevents double-booking and ghost-bookings.

skills.name: Knowledge-Grounded Q&A
skills.description: Answers business-specific questions (hours, services, pricing, locations, policies) from the tenant's ingested knowledge base (website pages, PDFs, GBP listing). Refuses to fabricate.

skills.name: Outbound SMS / Email
skills.description: Sends confirmations, reminders, and tenant-authorized one-off messages. TCPA-compliant: checks consent record, honors STOP/UNSUBSCRIBE, throttled per tenant tier.

skills.name: Escalate to Human
skills.description: When the caller's intent doesn't match Vera's capability OR they explicitly ask for a human, warm-transfers to the configured escalation number with a verbal handoff summary.
